name: grammar-fix-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — Grammar correction, spelling fixes, readability analysis, and tone detection.

tools.name: fix_grammar
tools.description: Check and fix grammar errors including homophones, punctuation, capitalization, and common mistakes.

tools.name: check_spelling
tools.description: Check spelling against a comprehensive dictionary of common misspellings with suggestions.

tools.name: improve_readability
tools.description: Analyze and suggest improvements for readability using Flesch-Kincaid and other metrics.

tools.name: analyze_tone
tools.description: Analyze writing tone and style: formal/informal, positive/negative, assertive/tentative.
